positive: A sophisticated and whimsical arrangement featuring abstract, bioluminescent celestial bodies, stylized deep-sea flora, and minimalist mythological beasts (like stylized phoenix wings or deep-sea anglerfish). The composition should be circular and contained, evoking a cosmic-meets-underwater biome. The style should be neo-sacred geometry mixed with Art Nouveau elegance, utilizing a limited palette of midnight blue, deep teal, iridescent violet, and pops of luminous gold and electric cyan. Strong, clean silhouettes are paramount, with highly detailed line work and soft gradients creating depth. Composition must be centered and scalable for apparel print, ensuring the elements interact seamlessly without harsh edges or overly complex backgrounds. Focus on high contrast between the deep background and the glowing, luminous subjects. Ideal for a mesmerizing, mystical repeating pattern or a bold single graphic.
negative: blurry, noisy, lowres, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, oversaturated, childish, photorealistic, 3d render, dirty, grime
